nasb.text: that you keep the commandment without stain or reproach until the appearing of our Lord Jesus Christ,

esv.text: to keep the commandment unstained and free from reproach until the appearing of our Lord Jesus Christ,

cnv.text: 你當毫無玷污，無可指摘地持守這命令，直到我們主耶穌基督的顯現。

ccb.text: 要遵守这命令，做纯洁无瑕、无可指责的人，一直到我们的主耶稣基督再来。

csbs.text: 要毫无玷污、无可指责地遵守这命令，直到我们主耶稣基督的显现。
